input.initialPrompt: Analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this project. I haven't run any coverage yet.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this project. They haven't run any coverage yet, so I need to first understand the project structure, then set up and run tests with coverage, and finally analyze the results to identify risk hotspots.

Let me start by exploring the project structure to understand what we're working with.

data.reasoningText: Now I have a good understanding of the project. Let me run the tests with code coverage enabled. The project uses coverlet.collector which is already referenced. I'll run tests with coverage collection and then analyze the results.

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-5e5b041638754466ae84e12b705c61b0 && dotnet tool install --global dotnet-reportgenerator-globaltool --version 5.4.1 2>&1 | tail -3 && export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet/tools" && reportgenerator -reports:./TestResults/*/coverage.cobertura.xml -targetdir:./CoverageReport -reporttypes:"TextSummary" 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo "---" && cat ./CoverageReport/Summary.txt
